summary: PR 309 corrected longstanding HSD JObj symbol names in assembly/function listings and added always-inline JObj helpers in jobj.h. The old assembly symbol HSD_JObjCheckDepend was renamed to HSD_JObjCheckDependAll, and the symbol previously labeled HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty was renamed to HSD_JObjResetRST, with callsites updated accordingly. Because the actual HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty behavior is an inline wrapper around HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty and HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub, this PR added that inline plus HSD_JObjSetTranslate, matching observed usage in decompiled functions.
what_changed: Added declarations in src/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.h for HSD_JObjCheckDependAll, HSD_JObjResetRST, and HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub.
Added an always-inline HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty helper that checks jobj is non-NULL and not already dirty via HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty before calling HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub.
Added an always-inline HSD_JObjSetTranslate helper that asserts non-NULL jobj and translate vector, copies the Vec into jobj->translate, and marks the JObj matrix dirty unless flag 0x2000000 is set.
Renamed the assembly label HSD_JObjCheckDepend to HSD_JObjCheckDependAll in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.s and updated internal calls from HSD_JObjAnim, func_803707F8, and HSD_JObjAnimAll.
Renamed the assembly label HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty to HSD_JObjResetRST and updated a callsite in asm/melee/text_2.s plus an internal call in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.s.
Updated include/functions.h comment stubs to use HSD_JObjCheckDependAll and HSD_JObjResetRST instead of the older incorrect names.
smart_moves: Separated the real out-of-line reset routine, now HSD_JObjResetRST, from the inline matrix-dirty wrapper, avoiding a misleading symbol map where a complex function was named HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty.
Encoded common JObj operations as always-inline helpers in the header, which lets decompiled callers use SDK-like source while preserving matching codegen.
Kept the inline HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty minimal: null guard, dirty-state guard, then call to HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub, which is exactly the sort of wrapper pattern useful for matching repeated HSD code.

Preserved assert file names and line numbers in HSD_JObjSetTranslate, using __assert("jobj.h", 916, "jobj") and __assert("jobj.h", 917, "translate"), which can matter for matching and diagnostic string references.
decomp_lessons: Do not assume an assembly label name is semantically correct just because it has been in the symbol map for a long time; verify behavior against SDK-style inline wrappers and call patterns.
When an apparent library function is widely called but its behavior is only a guard plus a subroutine call, it may be an inline rather than an out-of-line symbol.
For HSD JObj code, model matrix dirtying through HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty as an inline wrapper over HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty and HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub.
For HSD JObj translation setters, copying the Vec field and conditionally dirtying the matrix can be expressed in source via HSD_JObjSetTranslate rather than open-coding it at every callsite.
Symbol renames in assembly should be propagated to callsites and include/functions.h stubs so future matching work searches for the correct semantic names.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_JObjCheckDependAll for the routine previously labeled HSD_JObjCheckDepend.
Use HSD_JObjResetRST for the routine previously labeled HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty.
Reserve HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty for the inline helper that calls HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub only when needed.
Use HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub for the out-of-line dirty-marking implementation called by the inline wrapper.
Follow HSD baselib naming style with HSD_JObj-prefixed functions and CamelCase operation suffixes such as SetupMatrix, SetTranslate, ResetRST, and CheckDependAll.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use #pragma push / #pragma always_inline on / #pragma pop around small HSD helper functions when matching callers that expect the helper body inlined.
Inline HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty should compile as a null check plus HSD_JObjMtxIsDirty comparison against FALSE before calling HSD_JObjSetMtxDirtySub.
Inline HSD_JObjSetTranslate should preserve the null assertions, Vec struct copy into jobj->translate, flag test against 0x2000000, and conditional call to HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty.

Renaming assembly labels without changing instructions can still be important matching infrastructure: callsites in asm/melee/text_2.s and asm/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.s were updated to the corrected target names.
review_feedback: No review comments or formal review feedback were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR body states the inline helpers were tested on the functions they were matching, but the slice does not identify those functions beyond the changed callsites and JObj assembly context.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that use HSD_JObjSetTranslate inline in matched C code.
Find later PRs that replace open-coded matrix dirty logic with HSD_JObjSetMtxDirty.
Audit remaining HSD_JObj symbols for names that may still reflect old symbol-map guesses rather than SDK semantics.
Search for HSD_JObjResetRST callsites to confirm the rename remained stable after more JObj decompilation.
